title: Binary public health referendum-style decision over 7 polling rounds

ground_truth_outcome.source: https://ourworldindata.org/covid-vaccinations — Italy: 54% with at least one dose by June 30, 2021; IPSOS Global Attitudes June 2021: ~80% willing

events.description: COUNTRY officially launched its national COVID-19 vaccination campaign in coordination with other INSTITUTIONAL_BLOC member states
The Medicines Agency (EMA) granted authorization for the Moderna COVID-19 AGAINST_LEADER_1, expanding the available supply
Pfizer-BioNTech announced delivery delays to COUNTRY, causing a temporary slowdown in the national vaccination rate due to limited stock
The first shipment of the AstraZeneca AGAINST_LEADER_1 arrived in COUNTRY, providing a new supply source for the vaccination campaign
General PRO_LEADER_1 was appointed as the new Special Commissioner for the COVID-19 emergency to oversee the acceleration of the vaccination campaign
